debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
a : U
h1 : a ∈ A
h2 : empty (A \ {a})
⊢ A = {a}

proof:
by
  apply Set.Subset.antisymm
  · -- Prove A ⊆ {a}
    intro x hx
    by_contra h
    have h3 : x ≠ a := by tauto
    have h4 : x ∈ A := hx
    have h5 : x ∉ ({a} : Set U) := by simp [h3]
    have h6 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
      exact ⟨h4, h5⟩
    have h7 : ∃ (x : U), x ∈ A \ {a} := ⟨x, h6⟩
    have h8 : ¬ (∃ (x : U), x ∈ A \ {a}) := by
      simpa [empty] using h2
    exact h8 h7
  · -- Prove {a} ⊆ A
    intro x hx
    have h3 : x = a := by simpa using hx
    rw [h3]
    exact h1
failed_attempts:
by
  apply Set.eq_singleton_iff_unique_mem.mpr
  constructor
  · -- Prove that a ∈ A
    exact h1
  · -- Prove that for any x ∈ A, x = a
    intro x hx
    by_contra hx'
    -- Assume x ≠ a, then x ∈ A \ {a}, contradicting h2
    have h3 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
      refine' ⟨hx, _⟩
      intro h4
      apply hx'
      simp_all
    have h4 : ¬(x ∈ A \ {a}) := by
      intro h5
      have h6 : nonempty (A \ {a}) := ⟨x, h5⟩
      exact not_nonempty_iff.mp (by simpa using h2) h6
    exact h4 h3

by
  have h3 : A ⊆ {a} := by
    intro x hx
    by_contra h4
    have h5 : x ≠ a := by tauto
    have h6 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
      refine' ⟨hx, _⟩
      intro h7
      apply h5
      exact h7
    have h7 : ¬(∃ y : U, y ∈ A \ {a}) := by
      simpa [Set.empty_iff] using h2
    exact h7 ⟨x, h6⟩
  have h4 : {a} ⊆ A := by
    intro x hx
    have h5 : x = a := by simpa using hx
    rw [h5]
    exact h1
  exact Set.Subset.antisymm h3 h4

by
  have h3 : A ⊆ {a} := by
    intro x hx
    by_cases hxa : x = a
    · simp_all [hxa]
    · have h4 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
        constructor <;> simp_all [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
        <;> aesop
      have h5 : x ∈ (A \ {a}) := h4
      have h6 : ¬(x ∈ (A \ {a})) := by
        have h7 : (A \ {a}) = ∅ := by
          have h8 : empty (A \ {a}) := h2
          have h9 : (A \ {a}) = ∅ := by
            apply Set.eq_empty_of_forall_not_mem
            intro x hx
            have h10 : x ∈ (A \ {a}) := hx
            exact absurd h10 (by simp_all [Set.empty_iff])
          exact h9
        simp_all [Set.ext_iff]
      contradiction
  have h4 : {a} ⊆ A := by
    intro x hx
    have h5 : x = a := by simp_all [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    rw [h5]
    exact h1
  have h5 : A = {a} := by
    apply Set.Subset.antisymm
    · exact h3
    · exact h4
  exact h5

by
  have h3 : A ⊆ {a} := by
    intro x hx
    by_contra hx'
    -- If x ≠ a, then x ∈ A \ {a}, which is empty, leading to a contradiction.
    have h4 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
      apply Set.mem_diff_of_mem hx
      intro h5
      apply hx'
      simpa using h5
    have h5 : x ∈ A \ {a} := h4
    have h6 : ∃ (x : U), x ∈ A \ {a} := ⟨x, h5⟩
    have h7 : Nonempty (A \ {a}) := by
      apply Nonempty.intro
      exact h5
    have h8 : empty (A \ {a}) := h2
    exact h8.false h7
  -- Since A ⊆ {a} and a ∈ A, we have A = {a}.
  have h9 : A = {a} := by
    apply Set.Subset.antisymm h3
    intro x hx
    simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx ⊢
    rw [hx]
    exact h1
  exact h9

by
  have h3 : A ⊆ {a} := by
    intro x hx
    by_cases h : x = a
    · -- If x = a, then x is in {a}
      simp [h]
    · -- If x ≠ a, then x is in A \ {a}, which is empty
      have h4 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
        simp_all [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
        <;> aesop
      have h5 : x ∈ (A \ {a} : Set U) := h4
      have h6 : ¬(x ∈ (A \ {a} : Set U)) := by
        simpa [Set.ext_iff] using h2
      contradiction
  -- Since A ⊆ {a} and a ∈ A, we have A = {a}
  have h7 : {a} ⊆ A := by
    intro x hx
    have h8 : x = a := by simp [hx]
    rw [h8]
    exact h1
  exact Set.Subset.antisymm h3 h7

by
  apply Set.ext
  intro x
  have h3 : x ∈ A → x = a := by
    intro hx
    by_contra h4
    have h5 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
      apply Set.mem_diff_of_mem hx
      simp_all [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    have h6 : ¬(x ∈ A \ {a}) := by
      intro h7
      have h8 : x ∈ (A \ {a} : Set U) := h7
      have h9 : (A \ {a} : Set U) = (∅ : Set U) := by
        simpa [Set.empty_iff] using h2
      rw [h9] at h8
      exact absurd h8 (by simp)
    exact h6 h5
  have h7 : x = a → x ∈ A := by
    intro hx
    have h8 : x = a := hx
    rw [h8]
    exact h1
  simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
  constructor
  · intro hx
    have h9 : x ∈ A := hx
    have h10 : x = a := h3 h9
    exact h10
  · intro hx
    have h9 : x = a := hx
    have h10 : x ∈ A := h7 h9
    exact h10

by
  have h_sub : {a} ⊆ A := by
    intro x hx
    simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx
    rw [hx]
    exact h1
  
  have h_sup : A ⊆ {a} := by
    intro x hx
    have h3 : x = a := by
      by_contra h4
      have h5 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
        apply Set.mem_diff_of_mem
        · exact hx
        · intro h6
          apply h4
          simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h6
          <;> aesop
      have h6 : x ∉ A \ {a} := by
        rw [h2] at *
        exact Set.not_mem_empty x
      exact h6 h5
    simp [h3]
    <;> aesop
  
  have h_main : A = {a} := by
    apply Set.Subset.antisymm
    · -- Prove A ⊆ {a}
      exact h_sup
    · -- Prove {a} ⊆ A
      exact h_sub
  
  exact h_main

  apply Set.Subset.antisymm
  · -- Prove A ⊆ {a}
    intro x hx
    by_cases h : x = a
    · -- If x = a, then x ∈ {a}
      simp_all
    · -- If x ≠ a, derive a contradiction using the empty assumption
      have h3 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
        exact ⟨hx, by intro h4; apply h; simp_all⟩
      have h4 : x ∉ A \ {a} := by
        have h5 : empty (A \ {a}) := h2

        <;> aesop
      exact absurd h3 h4
  · -- Prove {a} ⊆ A
    intro x hx
    have h3 : x = a := by simp_all
    rw [h3]
    exact h1

by
  have h3 : A ⊆ {a} := by

    · -- Case: x ≠ a
      have h4 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by

  have h4 : {a} ⊆ A := by

    intro x hx
    simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx
    rw [hx]
    exact h1
  -- Combine the two inclusions to get A = {a}
  exact Set.Subset.antisymm h3 h4

by
  apply Set.ext
  intro x
  have h3 : x ∈ A ↔ x ∈ ({a} : Set U) := by
    constructor
    · -- Prove the forward direction: if x ∈ A, then x ∈ {a}
      intro hx
      by_cases h : x = a
      · -- If x = a, then x ∈ {a}
        simp [h]
      · -- If x ≠ a, derive a contradiction
        have h4 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
          -- Show that x ∈ A and x ∉ {a}
          have h5 : x ∈ A := hx
          have h6 : x ∉ ({a} : Set U) := by
            intro h7
            apply h
            simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using h7
          exact ⟨h5, h6⟩
        -- Since A \ {a} is empty, this leads to a contradiction
        have h7 : False := h2 h4
        exact False.elim h7
    · -- Prove the backward direction: if x ∈ {a}, then x ∈ A
      intro hx
      -- Since x ∈ {a}, we have x = a
      have h4 : x = a := by simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using hx
      -- Since a ∈ A, x = a ∈ A
      rw [h4]
      exact h1
  -- Convert the logical equivalence to set equality
  simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using h3

theorem singleton_of_diff_empty {U : Type} {A : Set U} {a : U}
    (h1 : a ∈ A) (h2 : empty (A \ {a})) : A = {a} := by
  apply Set.eq_singleton_iff_unique_mem.mpr
  <;>
  (try simp_all) <;>
  (try tauto) <;>
  (try
    {
      intro x hx
      by_contra h
      have h3 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
        refine' ⟨hx, _⟩
        intro h4
        apply h
        simp_all
      have h4 : x ∉ A \ {a} := by
        rw [IsEmpty.not_mem] at h2
        exact h2
      exact h4 h3
    })

theorem singleton_of_diff_empty {U : Type} {A : Set U} {a : U}
    (h1 : a ∈ A) (h2 : empty (A \ {a})) : A = {a} := by
  have h3 : A ⊆ {a} := by
    intro x hx
    by_contra h
    have h4 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
      refine' ⟨hx, _⟩
      intro h5
      apply h
      simp_all
    have h5 : x ∉ A \ {a} := by
      rw [IsEmpty.not_mem] at h2
      exact h2
    exact h5 h4
  have h4 : {a} ⊆ A := by
    intro x hx
    simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx ⊢
    rw [hx]
    exact h1
  exact Set.Subset.antisymm h3 h4

theorem singleton_of_diff_empty {U : Type} {A : Set U} {a : U}
    (h1 : a ∈ A) (h2 : empty (A \ {a})) : A = {a} := by
  apply Set.Subset.antisymm
  · -- Prove A ⊆ {a}
    intro x hx
    by_contra h
    have h3 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
      refine' ⟨hx, _⟩
      intro h4
      apply h
      simp_all
    have h4 : x ∉ A \ {a} := by
      rw [IsEmpty.not_mem] at h2
      exact h2
    exact h4 h3
  · -- Prove {a} ⊆ A
    intro x hx
    simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx ⊢
    rw [hx]
    exact h1

    (h1 : a ∈ A)

    · -- If x ≠ a, then x ∈ A \ {a}, contradicting h2
      have h3 : x ∈ A \ {a} := ⟨hx, auto⟩
      have h4 : ¬(x ∈ A \ {a}) := by
        intro h5
        exact h2 ⟨x, h5⟩
      exact absurd h3 h4
  · -- Prove {a} ⊆ A
    intro x hx
    simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx
    rw [hx]
    exact h1
